result.summary: Found 2 notable visual issues: a missing/blank button in the header and fine print text being obscured by an overlay element.

issues.description: The top-right header button appears as a blank yellow/orange rectangle with no visible text or label. This is likely a CTA button (e.g., 'Sign Up' or 'Log In') that failed to render its text content.
issues.suggestion: Inspect the button element for missing text content, a failed font load, or a color contrast issue where white/light text is rendering against the light yellow background. Ensure the button label is properly defined and visible.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' sticky/overlay banner at the bottom of the page is covering part of the fine print/terms and conditions text, making it partially unreadable. This is a legal disclaimer and must be fully legible.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding to the fine print section so it is not obscured by the scroll prompt overlay, or reposition the overlay so it does not overlap critical legal text.
